creator: liedtke@punkt.de
text:
Created attachment 215784
diff for /usr/local/etc/rc.d/garb

Hey,

I tried to make a galera cluster work with garbd. But unfortunately it is not possible to start garbd via the service command and pass a config file. So I propose a rc.conf option with this "PR" called garb_conf_file, which offers the possibility to configure the garbd config location.

Please find attached the diff of my PR.

Best Regards
Lars
